overview: This discipline covers robot design, automation, AI integration, machine control, and smart system development—skills that are essential for future industries.
waiver_info: Waiver/Scholarship Facilities of DIU: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Player quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Students having a minimum 2.5 GPA both in Secondary School Certificate (SSC) and Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) 12 class passed. Equivalent to two A-level subjects and at least two A-level subjects may apply. Out of these 5 subjects, applicants must have a minimum 4 'B' grade & 3 'C' grade respectively. The applicants must have Physics and Mathematics both at O-level and A-level.
curriculum_highlights: Fundamentals of Electrical and Electronic Engineering
contact: Admission Helpline: +880 961 790 1212, daffodil.edu.bd / admission.daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, Daffodil Smart City, Birulia, Savar, Dhaka 1216
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
